title: Level 5 - Stress Test
description: Large-context runs, top-k sensitivity, reranking sensitivity, and cache interaction testing.

cases.query: show recent payments, invoices, inquiries, and member renewals by branch

signals: this case is sensitive to how top-k expands the in-scope context
failure_classification_hints.investigation: Compare the trace at top_k=3 versus top_k=10 to see where the wrong tables enter the context.

cases.query: which sources create the most inquiries and which campaigns convert them

signals: conversion queries tend to pull in adjacent marketing tables
failure_classification_hints.investigation: Inspect top-k sensitivity and reranking between inquiry and campaign-related chunks.

cases.query: show me the 5 most recent payments

signals: this case should warm the cache and then test whether the cached answer stays correct
failure_classification_hints.investigation: Inspect cache epoch behavior and ensure repeated runs do not reuse stale SQL or answer text.

cases.query: summarize employees, workshifts, contacts, and invoices for the last 30 days

signals: large-context runs can expose token pressure and wrong table prioritization
failure_classification_hints.investigation: Inspect the sql_context_focus trace and compare the tables_before_focus versus tables_after_focus sequence.
